debug_info.goal:
case some.none
𝕜 : Type u_3
α : Type u_4
mα : MeasurableSpace α
inst✝² : DiscreteMeasurableSpace α
inst✝¹ : Fintype α
inst✝ : RCLike 𝕜
r : ENNReal
f g : α → 𝕜
hr₀ : r ≠ 0
p : NNReal
hpqr : ENNReal.HolderTriple (some p) none r
⊢ ‖f * g‖ₙ_[r] ≤ ‖f‖ₙ_[some p] * ‖g‖ₙ_[none]

failed_attempts:
simpa [cLpNorm_top] using (cLpNorm_le_cLpNorm_of_exponent_le (f := f * g) (p := r) (q := ⊤) (by
      simpa [hr₀] using (ENNReal.coe_ne_zero.2 hr₀)) ).trans <| by
        simpa [cLpNorm_top, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm]

simp only [ENNReal.some_eq_coe] at hpqr
    have hr : r = (some p) := by
      simpa [ENNReal.HolderTriple] using hpqr
    subst hr
    simpa [cLpNorm_top] using cLpNorm_mul_le_cLpNorm_mul_cLpNorm_top (f := f) (g := g) p

have hr : r = p := (hpqr.r_eq_of_right_eq_zero rfl).symm
    subst hr
    simpa [cLpNorm_top] using (cLpNorm_mul_le_cLpNorm_left (f := f) (g := g) (p := (some p)))

simpa [cLpNorm_top, cLpNorm_mul, cLpNorm_mul_eq_iSup_norm, iSup_mul, iSup_const,
      le_top] using le_top

simpa [cLpNorm_none, one_mul] using

simpa [cLpNorm_none] using

        simpa [ENNReal.some_eq_coe] using (hpqr.symm.rpow_add_rpow_eq_one hr₀).1)).trans
        (mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left (cLpNorm_mul_le_cLpNorm_mul_cLpNorm (p := (some p)) (q := none) (r := r) (f := f) (g := g) hr₀) (by positivity))

simpa [cLpNorm_none] using
      (cLpNorm_le_cLpNorm_of_exponent_le (f := f * g) (p := r) (q := (some 1)) ?_).trans <|
        (by
          simpa [one_mul] using
            (nnnorm_wInner_cWeight_le_dLpNorm_mul_dLpNorm (𝕜 := 𝕜) (f := f) (g := g)
              (p := (some p)) (q := (some 1))))

simpa [cLpNorm_top] using (cLpNorm_mono_right (f := f * g) (p := r) (q := (⊤ : ℝ≥0∞)) ?_)
  sorry

simpa using
      (cLpNorm_mul_le (𝕜 := 𝕜) (α := α) (f := f) (g := g) (p := (some p)) (q := (some 1))
        (r := r) hr₀)

simpa using
      (cLpNorm_mul_le (f := g) (g := f) (p := (0 : ℝ≥0∞)) (q := (some p)) (r := r) hr₀)
simp [cLpNorm_none, hr₀]

have hr : r = p := by
      simpa using (hpqr.r_eq_left (by simp : (q = ∞)))
    subst hr
    simpa using (cLpNorm_mul_le_right (p := some p) (f := f) (g := g))

simpa [cLpNorm_top, cLpNorm_mul] using
      (mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left (cLpNorm_le_cLpNorm_of_exponent_le (p := (some p)) (q := r) (by
        simpa using hpqr.one_le_r) (f := f * g)) (by positivity)).trans
        (mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right (cLpNorm_mul_le_cLpNorm_mul_cLpNorm (p := (some p)) (q := (some p))
          (r := r) hr₀ (f := f) (g := g)) (by positivity))
e)
simpa [cLpNorm_none] using (cLpNorm_mul_le_cLpNorm_mul_cLpNorm_top (r := r) (p := (some p)) (f := f) (g := g) hr₀)

have hr1 : r = 1 := by

    subst hr1
    simpa [cLpNorm_top] using cL1Norm_mul (f := f) (g := g)
f) (g := g) hr₀)
simpa using (cLpNorm_mul_le_top (f := f) (g := g) (p := (some p)) (r := r) hr₀)

have hr : r = p := by simpa using (hpqr.r_eq (by simp) (by simp) hr₀)

simpa [cLpNorm_none] using (cLqNorm_le_cLpNorm_of_le (f := f * g) (p := r) (q := p) (by

hr₀)
